title: dryopteris luerssenii
intro: Dryopteris luerssenii, also known as Luerssen's shield fern, is a type of fern plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and even aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Dryopteris luerssenii can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for its medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
